hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', d.get('file_path', ''))
if f and f.endswith(('.ts', '.js')) and '_generated_' not in f:
    subprocess.run(['npx', 'prettier', '--write', f], capture_output=True)
    subprocess.run(['npx', 'eslint', '--fix', f], capture_output=True)
"

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',d.get('file_path','')); banned='_generated_'; (sys.stderr.write('BLOCKED: Fern-generated code — do not edit manually\n'), sys.exit(2)) if banned in p else sys.exit(0)"
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude finished" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true
